title: theme — compliance evidence
description: WCAG 2.2 Level AA + ADA + EN 301 549 covered by the ContrastAuditor + accessibility_flags primitives. GDPR Art. 25 (data protection by design) covered by not shipping third-party analytics for per-user theme preference. SOC 2 CC8.1 (change management) covered by the ThemeActivated dual-write audit trail.

controls.evidence: ContrastAuditor computes contrast ratios for every color.text.* × color.surface.* pair; findings surface as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification when a pair drops below 4.5:1 (body) / 3:1 (large text).

high-contrast-light + high-contrast-dark platform presets ship with all pairs ≥ 7:1 (body) / 4.5:1 (large text). Selectable via preset picker; also auto-selected when a user's accessibility_overrides.high_contrast=true.
reduced_motion accessibility_flag zeroes motion.duration.* tokens. Honors prefers-reduced-motion OS setting via the compiled CSS's @media query.
larger_text accessibility_flag scales typography.*.size.* by +25%. Honors iOS Dynamic Type + Android font scaling.
focus_visible_always accessibility_flag forces outline on every interactive element regardless of pointer-vs-keyboard interaction.
Same as WCAG 1.4.3 — inherits ContrastAuditor findings.
focus_visible_always flag + platform presets ship with contrast-compliant outline styles.
Every tenant-facing rendering path reads theme tokens via TokenResolver — high-contrast + reduced-motion + larger-text preferences flow uniformly across dashboard, emails, PDFs, SDUI screens.
user_theme_preferences carries preferred_mode + accessibility_overrides only. NO device fingerprints, NO analytics, NO third-party tracking. The preference is functional, not marketing.
PurgeThemeDataForErasedTenant cascades tenant custom presets + themes + overrides on TenantErased. PurgeUserThemePreferenceForErasedUser removes per-user prefs on UserErased.
Theme preferences never leave the tenant boundary — no third-party CSS-in-JS or design-system SaaS sync. TokenResolver runs entirely in-process.
Every ThemeActivated + ThemeTokenOverridden + ThemeAccessibilityFlagChanged captured via audit dual-write. Metrics exported per metrics.json.

Last-N activation history retained for rollback. Every activation carries activated_by_user_id + activated_at. Rollback is a plain re-activation of a prior Theme row — the tokens_snapshot is preserved verbatim.
theme.manage + theme.activate permissions gate write paths. platform.theme.manage-presets gates platform preset writes to Stackra staff only.
